api.validation: The submitted data is invalid. Please check the highlighted fields and try again.
api.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action. Contact your organisation admin to update your role.
api.notFound: The requested resource could not be found. It may have been deleted or moved.
api.conflict: This record was updated by someone else. Refresh the page to see the latest version.
api.serverError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.
api.networkError: Unable to reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
api.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.

boundary.heading: Something went wrong
boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page. Try refreshing, or go back and try again.
